hypothesis.title: Broad neutral prompt pilot
hypothesis.statement: This pilot records descriptive outputs across matched entropy conditions.
hypothesis.null_statement: No scientific effect is established by this pilot.
hypothesis.success_criteria: Complete balanced, auditable descriptive evidence for every registered prompt.

configuration.note: Operating-system entropy; not a claim of specialised hardware randomness.

prompts.name: trust
prompts.content: What makes a scientific result trustworthy?

prompts.name: complexity
prompts.content: Why can simple rules produce complex behavior?

prompts.name: decision
prompts.content: How should a person make a decision when the evidence is incomplete?

prompts.name: language
prompts.content: How do languages change over time?

prompts.name: cooperation
prompts.content: Why do people cooperate with strangers?

prompts.name: attention
prompts.content: What problem deserves more attention than it currently receives?

experiment.name: Broad neutral prompt battery pilot
experiment.description: Eight independent neutral question revisions, matched across deterministic PRNG and operating-system entropy conditions. LM Studio seed support is best-effort.
